description_long: This is a luxurious, vintage-style armchair featuring a deep, tufted backrest upholstered in rich, dark red leather. The seat and armrests are also covered in matching leather, with the armrests flaring outward and blending into the ornate, dark wooden frame. The chair's legs are elegantly curved, adding to its classic and sophisticated appearance. The back of the chair is fully upholstered in the same red leather, bordered by the dark wood frame, and lacks any visible fasteners or embellishments. The overall construction suggests a sturdy, high-quality piece, likely intended for upscale urban interiors or public spaces such as hotel lobbies or executive offices. The combination of plush cushioning and robust woodwork provides both comfort and visual appeal.
description: A vintage-style armchair with deep red tufted leather upholstery, ornate curved wooden legs, and flared armrests. The design is plush, elegant, and suitable for upscale urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tufted leather backrest, wide seat, and outward-flaring armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thick, padded armrest and the pronounced curve of the wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the fully upholstered backrest framed by dark wood, with no visible fasteners.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the armrest and curved leg profile.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, outward-flaring, padded and upholstered in leather with dark wooden framing
attribute_backrest_style: high, rounded, deeply tufted with button details, fully upholstered in leather
